name: The Amazing Digital Circus! || RPG BOT
description:
Amazing Digital Circus is made by Gooseworx and Glitch Productions Go check out both of their stuff it is great :D

This is set up so it can be any pov and you can be already existing characters if you really want to.


I used the anime tag cus there isn't an indie animation tag lol

You can take the bot personality description thingy and add your own headcanons if you'd like as long as you give credit for the description, as this took a good while to type out. 
Comments and feeback are much appreciated as well. Have a great day!
creator: VeronicaKR25
